scripts.postinstall: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const cmd = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'curl -L https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/releases/latest/download/yt-dlp.exe -o yt-dlp.exe' : 'curl -L https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/releases/latest/download/yt-dlp -o yt-dlp && chmod +x yt-dlp'; execSync(cmd, { stdio: 'inherit' });"
